name: Google Survey Opt-In Module Setup

Click the "}, {"text": "Send Token Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and an email will be sent to you with a security token. Copy the token and paste it into the verification field. Click the "}, {"text": "Verify Token", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and your changes can be saved. The token will last two hours in case you need to change multiple scripts."}]}]}]}]
